description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-status-indicator

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-status-indicator/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Dot colors per status, size, pulse animation. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Screen reader text for status. Not color-alone indication. aria-label.
3. **Functionality** — Status variants (online, offline, busy, away, etc.). Pulse/animation. Size. Text label.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Pulse animation. Reduced-motion.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Variants. ARIA. Animation. Reduced-motion.
8. **Storybook** — All statuses. With label. Sizes. Animated.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — User status. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-status-indicator
